Adorix transforms static screens into intelligent agents. Track real attention, interact with voice, and serve personalized content in real-time.

The Intelligent Flow

Adorix turns passive screens into active, intelligent agents. Detect visitors, analyze demographics, and serve personalized content in milliseconds all while maintaining absolute privacy. It’s not just a display; it’s a responsive environment that adapts to everyone.

Tech Stack

Raspberry Pi
Python
TensorFlow
OpenCV
Node.js
React
JavaScript
Vite
Tailwind CSS
Framer Motion
Recharts
Picovoice

Our Vision

To breathe life into the digital frontier, creating a world where every screen is a sentient partner that understands, anticipates, and respects the human gaze.

Our Mission

To pioneer the next generation of interactive intelligence—transforming raw physiological data into meaningful brand dialogues through ethical, high-fidelity AI vision.

Powerful Features
Built for Results

Precision Campaigns

Create hyper-targeted campaigns with our advanced segmentation tools. Deliver personalized experiences at scale.

Audience Targeting

Reach the right people at the right time. Our smart algorithms ensure maximum engagement and conversion.

Enterprise Security

Bank-level encryption and compliance with industry standards. Your data is protected with military-grade security.

Real-Time Analytics

Track every interaction with comprehensive dashboards. Make data-driven decisions with actionable insights.

AI-Powered Insights

Leverage advanced machine learning to understand customer behavior and optimize your campaigns in real-time.

Lightning Fast Performance

Experience blazing-fast ad delivery with our optimized infrastructure. Your campaigns load instantly, every time.
